review.verdict: Fascinating decentralized GPU experiment, but still too rough for production-critical training.
review.best_for: Open-source AI researchers and hobbyists wanting cheaper distributed training compute
review.not_for: Production ML teams needing reliability, SLAs, or enterprise data security
